message:
feat: disk cache for fast path - 5x faster warm cache than uv

Add two-level caching to Simple API + PEP 658 fast path:
- Cache METADATA text for instant dependency info on warm runs
- Cache Simple API HTML to skip network calls entirely
- Three-phase cache lookup: METADATA → Simple API → Network

Performance comparison with flask:
- Cold: uv ~144ms vs metal0 ~467ms (uv faster)
- Warm: uv ~16ms vs metal0 ~3ms (metal0 5x faster)

The warm cache performance is now significantly faster than uv
due to storing parsed METADATA text directly on disk.
